chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.03 of 2026 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For orders on office objection No.26 2. For orders on CMA No.142/2026 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.143/2026 24.03.2026 None present. Applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation and justification, therefore, in view of the judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
